title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN ANDRES ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ANDRES, MUNICIPALITY OF MALVAR, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MIGUEL ARANDA MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 3274 / 85 OG No. 22, 3598 (May 29, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6719, March 17, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN ANDRES ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ANDRES, MUNICIPALITY OF MALVAR, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MIGUEL ARANDA MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of San Andres Elementary School in Barangay San Andres, Municipality of Malvar, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Miguel Aranda Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 26, 1989 and December 2, 1988, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved: March 17, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
